title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought major workflow automation improvements with a new policy engine that lets you define how work should flow through your revenue operations processes. We also expanded our skill catalog to 683 capabilities across 25 categories and fixed critical deployment issues in Salesforce and HubSpot that were preventing automations from running properly.

entries.headline: New policy engine automates work lifecycle management
Work tracking now captures all activity automatically
Skill catalog expanded to 683 skills across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and workflow guidance
Salesforce deployments recover automatically from errors
Salesforce state and country fields now deploy correctly
details: Detects state and country picklist configurations that could cause deployment failures
Enforces proper deployment paths and adds automatic retry capabilities

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now process more reliably
HubSpot automations work again after missing file restore
